calendar.matters:
Petition For Termination Of Proceedings And Discharge Of Personal Representative
Off Calendar Jan-11-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Cynthia Durant, petitioner in pro per.

The Court stated that there was a problem in that things were done in the wrong order; the personal representative should have done the 1300 distribution before filing the petition for probate. He noted that probate rules were complicated and therefore generally beyond the competency of persons without legal training, which was why the Court strongly recommends that individuals coming before the probate court have appropriate legal representation. He said that he would review the petitions and decide whether to grant or deny them. The matters were taken under submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Robles. (Not Reported).
